- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If new tool: README roadmap updated (status → ✅ Done)
- [ ] If new tool: `client/src/data/tools.ts` entry set to `available: true`
- [ ] Tested manually with Claude Desktop, Cline, or CLI
